topics: Foundational Data Structures - Overview of Arrays and Linked Lists, Implementation of Pointers and Objects, Representing Rooted Trees, Hashing - Hash Tables, Hash Functions, Cuckoo Hashing

Heaps and Related Structures - Binomial Heap
Applications to Information Retrieval and WWW - AutoComplete using Tries

Search and Optimization Trees - Skip List, Tango Trees
Applications to Data Science - Approximate Nearest Neighbor Search, Applications to Information Retrieval and WWW, Posting List Intersection
Data Structure Applications - Distributed and Parallel Data Structures - Distributed Hash Tables
Data Compression and Transformations - Burrows-Wheeler Transform
